faqs.question: What types of wasps are common in Corona, Queens?
faqs.answer: Corona residents commonly encounter yellow jackets, paper wasps, and bald-faced hornets. All of these species can build nests in attics, under eaves, in trees, or underground, and our technicians are trained to handle each type safely.

faqs.question: Is wasp removal safe for my family and pets in Corona?
faqs.answer: Yes, our wasp removal methods prioritize safety for your family and pets. We use EPA-approved products and professional techniques to eliminate wasps while minimizing exposure. We'll provide specific safety instructions before and after treatment.
